reviews.comment:
Desde cuando hay alguien que te carga aire en las ruedas obligatoriamente y hay que pagarle? Y encima ese alguien ni siquiera es un playero. Tiene la campera del ACA pero maneja una grúa que nada que ver y esta ahí supongo que para "hacerse unos mangos". Practicamente te obliga a que aceptes que sea él quien te va a cargar aire y si le decis que no, no solo que se lo tenes que repetir 50 veces porque no te quiere dar la manguera sino que encima se ofende. Controlen un poco más muchachos porque jamas en mi vida vi algo similar. Menos en un ACA.

(Translated by Google)
Since when does someone force you to inflate your tires and you have to pay them? And on top of that, this person isn't even a gas station attendant. He's wearing an ACA jacket but drives a tow truck that has nothing to do with it, and I suppose he's there to "make a few bucks." He practically forces you to let him inflate your tires, and if you say no, not only do you have to repeat it 50 times because he won't give you the hose, but he also gets offended. Get a little more control, guys, because I've never seen anything like it in my life. Especially not at an ACA.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlbnBpYTNRRRAB
